summary: Iteration 107: Kitchen Production Intelligence - Backend 31/31 tests PASSED (100%). All features verified: Equipment status (3 working ovens, 1 in repair), Firing Sequence Engine with bottleneck detection and EchoStratus solutions, Tip Pool management (4 departments), Guest Recovery with EchoAi3 three-lobe logic, and 6 real Pier Sixty-Six BEOs.
critical_code_review_comments: Equipment database models real kitchen equipment: 4 Rational iCombi Pro ovens (1 in repair), Winston CVAP, 2 Cambro hot boxes, CresCorr cabinet, Jade range, 2 speed racks
Firing sequence engine correctly calculates sheet pan requirements based on covers and food categories
Bottleneck detection triggers when total sheet pans needed exceeds oven capacity (15 pans with 3 working ovens)
EchoStratus solutions provided: preplated_rational, staggered_firing, winston_cvap_hold
Tip pool correctly calculates on ORIGINAL BEO pricing even when comp is applied - GL shows comp loss separately
Guest Recovery three-lobe analysis (logical, guest_satisfaction, financial) provides balanced comp recommendations
Recovery probability scoring varies by guest reaction: disappointed (92%), upset (78%), irate (55%), wont_return (30%)
seed_data_creation: 6 real Pier Sixty-Six BEOs seeded: #7186 (Caribbean Dinner), #7626 (Setup), #7628 (Bar On Consumption), #7167 (Breakfast Buffet), #7187 (General Session), #7169 (BBQ Lunch). Tip pools seeded via GET /tip-pool/departments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 107 tested Kitchen Production Intelligence module. All endpoints working: GET /api/kitchen-production/equipment (3 working ovens, 1 in repair, 15 sheet pan capacity), POST /api/kitchen-production/firing-sequence (bottleneck detection at >100% utilization, EchoStratus solutions), GET /api/kitchen-production/tip-pool/departments (4 pools: banquet_foh, restaurant_foh, ird, pool_bar), POST /api/kitchen-production/tip-pool/calculate (tip pool on original pricing, GL shows comp loss), POST /api/kitchen-production/guest-recovery/evaluate (three-lobe analysis with recovery actions and probability scoring).
